titleStmt.title: SII 8.226: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 226. (A.R. No. 626 of 1902). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantupulka Arumaṟaiyin ne
ṟi Aṉaittun taḻaippa varumuṟaiUrimai maṇimuṭi cūṭit tiṅkaḷveṇkuṭait ticaikkaḷi ṟeṭṭum taṅkutanikkūṭam tāneṉa viḷa
ṅka karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅkol turappa poruṅkatirāḻi puviaṉait tuṭaṉ varavillavā Iraṭṭar miṉavar ciṅkaṇar
pallavar nutaliya pārttivar paṇiya kam puṇan=tu cempon virasiṁhāsanattup puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu
m vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājarājatevarkku yāṇṭu patināṟāvati
ṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu tuvāteciyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ Uṭai
yār tiruvalañcuḻiUṭaiyār tevatāṉam vaṭakarai vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Innamparnāṭṭu koṉilattu Ūr
kkucamainta koṉilamuṭaiyān malaiĀṇṭanāyakaṉum koṉilamuṭaiyān veḷān vāmaṉanāṉa Iṉṉamparnāṭ
ṭuveḷāṉum ceṟkiḻaiyāṉ kayilāyamuṭaiyāṉ pūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉum koṉilamuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa Iṉṉa
mparnāṭṭuveḷānum konilamuṭaiyān ṉāṉa vaṭakaraiṉāṭṭuveḷānum veḷāṉ tiruvalañcuḻi Uṭaiyāṉ
tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉum pakkalum viṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ tiruvalañcuḻi
Uṭaiyāṉum veḷārṉāyakaṉāṉa Iṭaiyāṟṟūrveḷāṉum vicalurkiḻavan villi tiruvalañcuḻiUṭaiyāṉum neṟkuppaiUṭai
yāṉ ciṟiyāṉ peruṅkāṭaṉu Āṉāṅkūruṭaiyāṉ Ekaṉāyakan tillaiṉāyakaṉum Ukiṉtuṟaiyaṉum
la ṭayāṉ peruṅkāvitimalaiyum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom nilavilaiyāvaṇam . nittavinotavaḷaṉāṭṭu nallūrṉāṭṭu
peruṅkaṟaiyil peruṅkaṟaiyūr kiḻavan veḷāṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉāṉa Irājarājacoḻakvataraiyar Uṭaiyaār tiruvalañcuḻiUṭai
yārkku vaikkiṟa tirunattāviḷakkupuṟamāka Ivarkku ṉāṅkaḷ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷuril Ūrppotuvāy Eṅkaḷ kāṇiyāy ṉā
ṅkaḷ Iṟuttuvarukiṟa nilam cuṅkantavittacoḻaṉvāykkālukku meṟku vikkiramacoḻamaṅkalattu Ellaikku kiḻakku Iṉṉamparṉāṭṭuveḷār
kāṇiyāṉa nilattukku teṟkum muṉpu ṉāṅkaḷ viṭṭa Ulakamuḻutumuṭaiyār vaicca tiruṉantāviḷakkuppuṟattukku vaṭakku nilam Orumā
vum Itaṉ teṟku cālaippattāṉa Akilaṉāyakancatirattu Iṉṉamparṉāṭṭuveḷāṉum Amparṉāṭṭuveḷāṉum nilattukku vaṭakkum cuṅ
kantavittacoḻaṉvāykkālukku meṟkum vikkiramacoḻan nilattu Ellaikku kiḻakkum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyār vaicca tiruṉuntāviḷakku
kku koṇṭu viṭṭa nilattukku teṟku nilam Orumāvaraiyum Āka nilam Irumāvarai Iṉṉilam Irumāvarai
yum Uṭaiyār tiruvalañcuḻiUṭaiyārkku Ivar vaitta tiruṉuntāviḷakku Onṟukku tiruṉuntāviḷakkup
puṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporu ḷaṉṟāṭu naṟkācukkum Innila mirumā
varaiyiṉāl vanta tevaai kaṭamaiyum Antarāyamum viniyokamum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭa cilvari peruvariyum
nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkaikkum Innilam Irumāvaraiyu mikutikkuṟai vuḷḷaṭaṅka viṟṟu IṟaiIḻiccik
kkumāka Avarpakkal nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu 3 100 Ikkācu muṉṉūṟuṅ koṇṭu Iṉnilattāl vanta
ṉa Ellām cantirātittavaṟ kiṟuppataṟ kicaintu Ippaṭi kallilum cempilum veṭṭikko
ḷḷakkaṭavatāka Ippaṭi cammaticcu Ippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom rājarājacoḻavataraaiyarkku
Ikkonilamuṭaiyān malaiāṇṭaṉāyakanum konilamuṭaiyān veḷān vāmanaṉāna I
ṉṉamparṉāṭṭuveḷāṉum cekkiḻān kayilāyan tiruppūvaṇamuUṭaiyāṉum konilamuṭaiyā
ṉāṉa Amparṉāṭṭuveḷāṉum konilamuṭaiyān valañcuḻicoṟaṉāna vaṭakaraiyṉāṭṭu
veḷāṉum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom . Iṉṉilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvatākavum
Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolai yāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ
māvaṟutip poruḷcilavolai kāṭṭakkaṭava ṉallātāṉākavum Ippaṭi Icaintu vilai
kkaṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Ivve
ḷān tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉāṉa rājarājacoḻavataraaiyarkku Ikkonilamuṭaiyāṉ malai
āṇṭaṉāyakan Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom . Ivarkaḷ colla piramāṇam Eḻuti nen Ivvūr Ū
rkkaṇakku neṟkuppaiUṭaiyāṉ tulaiyātacelvanen Ivai En Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭikku Ivai
konilamuṭaiyān malaiĀṇṭaṉāyakan Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai konilamuṭaiyāṉ veḷān vāmana
n Iṉṉamparṉāṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu ..tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉum vaṭakaraiṉāṭṭuveḷāṉum saṁjñaiyānamai
kku Ivai Ūrkkaṇakku neṟkuppaiUṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu veḷāṉ pakkaṉum cekkiḻaiyāṉum saṁjñaiyānamaikku
Ivai kaṭuvaṉkuṭaiyān Eḻuttu . malaiperiyāṉum veḷāṉ Uṭaiyāṉum milaṭṭuruṭaiyāṉum ciṟiyāṉ peru
ṅkāṭanum saṁjñaiyānamaikku Ivai pālaiyūrkiḻavan Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭai
yāṉ pemmāṉ Eḻuttu ..vicalūrkiḻavaṉum kaṇṭan karuṇākaraṉum saṁjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai Innamparṉā
ṭṭuveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭikku Ivai Ānāṅkūruṭaiyāṉ Ekaṉāyakan tillaināyakan Eḻuttu ..ivai Iṭai
yāṟṟūrṉāṭṭuveḷān saṁjñaiyānamaikku Ivai coḻamāttāṇṭāṇṭap peruntaiccan Eḻuttu ..amparṉāṭṭu
veḷān saṁjñaiyāṉamaikku Ivai Uyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭikku Ivai tiruvāykkeḻvi Uyyavan
tān Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭikku Ivai māmpākkiḻaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ veṇṇaimaṅkalamuṭaiyā neḻu
ttu .. Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ tiruvalañcuḻiUṭaiyā nāĀḷuṭaiyā neḻuttu .. Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ivai koyilkkaṇakku
vaṭukakkuṭaiyāṉ tillaiṉāyaka nāḷuṭaiyā neḻuttu ..ariyavaṉ Āṇṭavan saṁjñaiyānamaikku Ivai po
nnāḻal Eḻuttu .. Ippaṭi Aṟiven Ikkoyilil caivācāriyam Akoracivan Eḻuttu .. viḷattūrkiḻavan saṁjñaiyānamai
kku Ikkoyilil civa
Digital edition of SII 8.226 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
